_description: Curated CourtQuest tournament media. Run scripts/cleanup-media.js to move all non-keep files in /public/tournaments/ to /Trash_CourtQuest/. The script is non-destructive — all moved files can be recovered from that folder.

delete-rationale.chill-n-dill-rejected: ~479 photos not in the keep list above — burst duplicates, repetitive angles, lower detail. All moved to /Trash_CourtQuest/, not permanently deleted.
delete-rationale.rally-royale-heic: 19 HEIC files (IMG_4620, 4623, 4624, 4628, 4650-4653, 4659-4664, 4672, 4675-4677, 4725) — HEIC format is not natively supported by web browsers without server-side conversion.
delete-rationale.rally-royale-small-jpgs: IMG_4709.JPG (231KB), IMG_4714.JPG (196KB) — too small/low quality relative to other selections.
delete-rationale.rally-royale-misc: ChipotleOrder.jpg — catering order receipt, not a tournament photo.
delete-rationale.rally-royale-videos: All Videos1/*.MOV, Videos2/*.MOV, lastGames-002.mov except ClosingCeremony.mp4 — raw unedited clips, too large for web use.
